automated_loom_settlement.label: Automated Loom Settlement
automated_loom_settlement.notes: Dedicated execution source for automated federation and x402 settlement flows.
automated_loom_settlement.purpose: Legally segregated automated settlement hot wallet for Loom and x402 execution.

company_treasury.label: Company Treasury
company_treasury.notes: Authoritative balance is economy/ledger.json treasury.cash_usd. This file tracks account separation policy.
company_treasury.purpose: Main pool for all inflows. Owner capital, customer payments, and sponsorship land here first.

contributor_payout_pool.label: Contributor Payout Pool
contributor_payout_pool.notes: No wallet assigned. Requires owner approval to fund via transfer from company_treasury.
contributor_payout_pool.purpose: Allocated funds for contributor bounties and payouts. Funded by transfer from company_treasury.

maintainer_support.label: Maintainer Support
maintainer_support.notes: No wallet assigned. Requires owner approval to fund via transfer from company_treasury.
maintainer_support.purpose: Allocated funds for maintainer payouts. Funded by transfer from company_treasury.
